notes: MoE detected from config expert fields.
Hy3 detected: decoder uses split-QKV GQA with per-head Q/K RMSNorm before RoPE.
Hy3 MoE defaults to one dense prefix layer followed by sparse layers with sigmoid routing and expert correction bias.
Hy3 sparse FFNs combine routed experts with a shared SwiGLU MLP; router weights are normalized and scaled by router_scaling_factor.
MTP detected: 1 next-token prediction layer(s); the upstream Transformers loader ignores model.layers.80.* unexpected keys for now.
